1|//

     3|//  Ivx
     4|//
     5|//  Mirrors the Android app's `jv_deals` Supabase rows (expo/lib/jv-storage.ts)
     6|//  so both apps render the exact same live deals.
     7|//
     8|
     9|import Foundation
    10|
    11|/// A published JV deal from the production `jv_deals` table.
    12|nonisolated struct JVDeal: Identifiable, Decodable {
    13|    let id: String
    14|    let title: String?
    15|    let projectName: String?
    16|    let type: String?
    17|    let status: String?
    18|    let minInvestment: Double?
    19|    let expectedRoi: Double?
    20|    let profitSplit: String?
    21|    let city: String?
    22|    let state: String?
    23|    let propertyAddress: String?
    24|    let firstPhoto: String?
    25|
    26|    enum CodingKeys: String, CodingKey {
    27|        case id
    28|        case title
    29|        case projectName = "project_name"
    30|        case type
    31|        case status
    32|        case minInvestment = "min_investment"
    33|        case expectedRoi = "expected_roi"
    34|        case profitSplit = "profit_split"
    35|        case city
    36|        case state
    37|        case propertyAddress = "property_address"
    38|        case firstPhoto = "first_photo"
    39|    }
    40|
    41|    init(from decoder: Decoder) throws {
    42|        let container = try decoder.container(keyedBy: CodingKeys.self)
    43|        id = try container.decode(String.self, forKey: .id)
    44|        title = try? container.decodeIfPresent(String.self, forKey: .title)
    45|        projectName = try? container.decodeIfPresent(String.self, forKey: .projectName)
    46|        type = try? container.decodeIfPresent(String.self, forKey: .type)
    47|        status = try? container.decodeIfPresent(String.self, forKey: .status)
    48|        minInvestment = Self.flexibleDouble(container, .minInvestment)
    49|        expectedRoi = Self.flexibleDouble(container, .expectedRoi)
    50|        profitSplit = try? container.decodeIfPresent(String.self, forKey: .profitSplit)
    51|        city = try? container.decodeIfPresent(String.self, forKey: .city)
    52|        state = try? container.decodeIfPresent(String.self, forKey: .state)
    53|        propertyAddress = try? container.decodeIfPresent(String.self, forKey: .propertyAddress)
    54|        firstPhoto = try? container.decodeIfPresent(String.self, forKey: .firstPhoto)
    55|    }
    56|
    57|    private static func flexibleDouble(_ container: KeyedDecodingContainer<CodingKeys>, _ key: CodingKeys) -> Double? {
    58|        if let value = try? container.decodeIfPresent(Double.self, forKey: key) { return value }
    59|        if let text = try? container.decodeIfPresent(String.self, forKey: key) { return Double(text) }
    60|        return nil
    61|    }
    62|
    63|    /// Display name — Android renders project_name falling back to title.
    64|    var displayName: String {
    65|        let name = (projectName?.isEmpty == false ? projectName : title) ?? "JV Deal"
    66|        return name
    67|    }
    68|
    69|    /// "Southwest Ranches, FL" or the raw property address.
    70|    var displayLocation: String? {
    71|        if let city, !city.isEmpty {
    72|            if let state, !state.isEmpty { return "\(city), \(state)" }
    73|            return city
    74|        }
    75|        return propertyAddress
    76|    }
    77|
    78|    /// Human label for the deal type badge, matching Android copy.
    79|    var typeLabel: String {
    80|        switch (type ?? "").lowercased() {
    81|        case "profit_sharing": return "Profit Sharing"
    82|        case "development": return "Development"
    83|        case "jv": return "JV Partnership"
    84|        case "debt": return "Debt"
    85|        default: return (type ?? "JV").capitalized

responseMessageContents.text:
Build passed. Here's what I delivered end-to-end:

## What changed

**Project Reels synced with the 3 live projects**
- Reels now pulls from the video feed **and** the live `jv_deals` table, so all 3 projects (Casa Rosario, Perez Residence, IVX Jacksonville Prime) always appear — even when `?type=reel` returns 0 videos
- Each reel shows project name, location, ROI/value/term chips, and the investment option icons
- Tapping "Details" on any reel opens the full professional detail view

**Investment option icons (tokenized / JV deal / buyer)**
- Added a `InvestmentOption` enum with distinct SF Symbol icons + colors: tokenized (hexagon grid, gold), JV deal (person badge, blue), buyer (house flag, green)
- Icons appear on every deal card, reel overlay, and detail screen
- Each deal type surfaces the relevant paths in the right order

**Full professional JV deal detail view** (`JVDealDetailView.swift`)
- Swipeable photo gallery from the live `photos` array
- Financial summary grid: ROI, total investment, estimated value, min investment, term, distribution frequency
- Project details with expandable description
- Timeline & exit strategy section (start/end dates, exit strategy, min hold period)
- Development partner card (name, role, email, phone, property type, lot size, zoning)
- Legal & fee structure (governing law, dispute resolution, management/performance fees, profit split)
- Invest Now / View Deal / Schedule CTAs

**Expanded data model & service**
- `JVDeal` now decodes 30+ fields from Supabase (description, partner info, legal terms, fees, timeline, full photos array)
- `JVDealsService` fetches the complete professional field set
- Navigation wired: tap any deal card on Home or Invest → detail view; tap reel → detail view

**Files changed:**
- `ios-ivx/Ivx/Models/JVDeal.swift` — expanded model + `InvestmentOption` enum
- `ios-ivx/Ivx/Services/JVDealsService.swift` — full field select query
- `ios-ivx/Ivx/Views/JVDealDetailView.swift` — new professional detail screen
- `ios-ivx/Ivx/Views/ProjectReelsView.swift` — synced with 3 live projects + option icons
- `ios-ivx/Ivx/ViewModels/ProjectReelsViewModel.swift` — combined reels builder
- `ios-ivx/Ivx/Views/IVXComponents.swift` — deal card with option icons + tap navigation
- `ios-ivx/Ivx/Views/HomeFeedDealCard.swift` — tap to open detail
- `ios-ivx/Ivx/Views/HomeView.swift` — wired navigation destination
- `ios-ivx/Ivx/Views/InvestView.swift` — wired navigation destination

Build succeeded. Want me to also add a photo lightbox viewer or a ROI calculator inside the detail view?

Now, you can watch videos of each project and tap on them to see a full page of information, including photos, financial goals, and partner details. We also added new icons to clearly show different ways you can get involved, like joint ventures or direct purchases.
